function // =:seq.word:attribute:boolean /id // #PEGparse /href /a =(seq.word, attribute) boolean true

function // $:int:attribute /id // #PEGparse /href /a $(int) attribute empty:seq.attribute // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1

use standard

use seq.tableEntry

use seq1.frame

use stack.frame

use seq1.attribute

use PEGrules

function // place:thisresult:int /id // #PEGparse /href /a place(r:thisresult) int i.// //#/href top /a.stk.r

type frame is
Sstate:state
, Fstate:state
, i:int
, result:seq.attribute
, faili:int
, failresult:seq.attribute

type thisresult is stk:stack.frame

Function // status:thisresult:word /id // #PEGparse /href /a status(a:thisresult) word
// if /keyword Sstate.// //#/href top /a.stk.a ≠ // //#Match:state /href Match /a // then /keyword 'Failed
// else /keyword if // //#place:thisresult:int /href place /a.a // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a {length of input}faili.// //#/href top /a.stk.a // then /keyword 'Match
// else /keyword 'MatchPrefix

Function // result:thisresult:attribute /id // #PEGparse /href /a result(a:thisresult) attribute
// //#last:seq.T:T /href last /a.result.// //#/href top /a.stk.a

function // parse:seq.word:attribute:thisresult /id // #PEGparse /href /a parse(myinput0:seq.word, initAttr:attribute) thisresult
// let /keyword myinput = packed(myinput0 // //#/href+/a // //#endMark:word /href endMark /a)
// let /keyword packedTable = packed.// //#mytable:seq.tableEntry /href mytable /a
// for /keyword // stk = // //#empty::stack.T:stack.T /href empty:stack.frame /a
, state = // //#startstate:state /href startstate /a
, i = 1
, inputi = myinput // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1
, result = [initAttr]
, faili = 1
, failresult = [initAttr]/block // while /keyword toint.state // //#>:int:int:boolean /href > /a toint.// //#Match:state /href Match /a
// do /keyword // // let /keyword actionState = // //#action:state:state /href action /a.state,
// if /keyword actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#Fail:state /href Fail /a // then /keyword //{goto Fstate.top.stk, i = faili.top, pop.stk, discard result}
// let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk,
// if /keyword toint.// //#action:state:state /href action /a.Fstate.top ≥ toint.// //#/href S' /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword newi = i.top,
next(// // //#/href pop /a.stk
, // //#nextState:state:state /href nextState /a.Fstate.top
, newi
, idxNB(myinput, newi)
, result.top
, faili.top
, failresult.top /block)/block // else /keyword // next(// // //#/href pop /a.stk
, Fstate.top
, faili.top
, idxNB(myinput, faili.top)
, failresult.top
, faili.top
, failresult.top /block)/block /block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#Success*:state /href Success* /a // then /keyword //{goto Sstate.top.stk, pop.stk, keep result}
// let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk,
next(// //#/href pop /a.stk, Sstate.top, i, inputi, result.top // //#/href+/a result, faili.top, failresult.top)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#/href Discard* /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk,
next(// stk
, // //#nextState:state:state /href nextState /a.state
, i
, inputi
, result.top
, i
, result.top /block)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#All:state /href All /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk
// let /keyword att = //[// //#toAttribute:attribute:seq.word:attribute /href toAttribute /a(result // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a n.result, // //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(myinput, i.top, i // //#/href-/a 1))], /block next(// //#/href pop /a.stk, Sstate.top, i, inputi, result.top // //#/href+/a att, faili.top, failresult.top)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#Lambda:state /href Lambda /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword att = [// //#action:int:seq.attribute:attribute /href action /a(// //#reduceNo:state:int /href reduceNo /a.state, result)],
next(// stk
, // //#nextState2:state:state /href nextState2 /a.state
, i
, inputi
, result // //#/href+/a att
, faili
, failresult /block)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#Reduce:state /href Reduce /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk
// let /keyword att = [// //#action:int:seq.attribute:attribute /href action /a(// //#reduceNo:state:int /href reduceNo /a.state, result)],
next(// //#/href pop /a.stk, Sstate.top, i, inputi, result.top // //#/href+/a att, faili.top, failresult.top)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#Reduce*:state /href Reduce* /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword att = [// //#action:int:seq.attribute:attribute /href action /a(// //#reduceNo:state:int /href reduceNo /a.state, result)]
// let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk,
next(stk, // //#nextState:state:state /href nextState /a.state, i, inputi, att, i, att)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#!Reduce:state /href !Reduce /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk
// let /keyword ini = idxNB(myinput, faili.top),
next(// //#/href pop /a.stk, Fstate.top, faili.top, ini, failresult.top, faili.top, failresult.top)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#!Fail:state /href !Fail /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk
// let /keyword ini = idxNB(myinput, i.top),
next(// //#/href pop /a.stk, Sstate.top, i.top, ini, result.top, faili.top, failresult.top)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#/href T /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword te = idxNB(packedTable, // //#index:state:int /href index /a.state),
// if /keyword inputi ≠ match.te // then /keyword{fail}next(stk, Fstate.te, faili, idxNB(myinput, faili), failresult, faili, failresult)
// else /keyword next(stk, Sstate.te, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1, idxNB(myinput, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1), result, faili, failresult)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#!T:state /href !T /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword te = idxNB(packedTable, // //#index:state:int /href index /a.state),
// if /keyword inputi // //#=:word:word:boolean /href = /a match.te // then /keyword{fail}next(stk, Sstate.te, faili, idxNB(myinput, faili), failresult, faili, failresult)
// else /keyword next(stk, Fstate.te, i, inputi, result, faili, failresult)/block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#MatchAny:state /href MatchAny /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword te = idxNB(packedTable, // //#index:state:int /href index /a.state),
// if /keyword inputi // //#=:word:word:boolean /href = /a // //#endMark:word /href endMark /a // then /keyword{fail}next(stk, Fstate.te, i, inputi, result, faili, failresult)
// else /keyword // // let /keyword reslt = // result // //#/href+/a // //#toAttribute:attribute:seq.word:attribute /href toAttribute /a(result // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a n.result, [inputi])/block // let /keyword ini = idxNB(myinput, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1),
next(stk, Sstate.te, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1, ini, reslt, faili, failresult)/block /block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#T':state /href T' /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword te = idxNB(packedTable, // //#index:state:int /href index /a.state),
// if /keyword inputi // //#=:word:word:boolean /href = /a match.te // then /keyword next(stk, Sstate.te, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1, idxNB(myinput, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1), result, faili, failresult)
// else /keyword next(stk, Fstate.te, i, inputi, result, faili, failresult)/block // else /keyword //{match non Terminal}

use PEG

use UTF8

use seq.headerType

use standard

Export /keyword header(headerType) seq.word

function // $:int:seq.word /id // #functionHeader /href /a $(int) seq.word empty:seq.seq.word // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1

use standard

type frame is

, Fstate:state
, i:int
, result:seq.seq.word
, faili:int
, failresult:seq.seq.word

type resultType is stk:stack.frame

next(// // //#/href pop /a.stk
, // //#nextState:state:state /href nextState /a.Fstate.top
, newi
, idxNB(myinput, newi)
, result.top
, faili.top
, failresult.top /block)/block // else /keyword // next(// // //#/href pop /a.stk
, Fstate.top
, faili.top
, idxNB(myinput, faili.top)
, failresult.top
, faili.top
, failresult.top /block)/block /block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#Success*:state /href Success* /a // then /keyword //{goto Sstate.top.stk, pop.stk, keep result}
// let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk,

, // //#nextState:state:state /href nextState /a.state
, i

next(// stk
, // //#nextState2:state:state /href nextState2 /a.state

// let /keyword ini = idxNB(myinput, i.top),

// if /keyword inputi // //#=:word:word:boolean /href = /a // //#endMark:word /href endMark /a // then /keyword{fail}next(stk, Fstate.te, i, inputi, result, faili, failresult)
// else /keyword // // let /keyword reslt = // result // //#/href+/a // //#toAttribute:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word /href toAttribute /a(result // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a n.result, [inputi])/block // let /keyword ini = idxNB(myinput, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1),
next(stk, Sstate.te, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1, ini, reslt, faili, failresult)/block /block // else /keyword if actionState // //#=:state:state:boolean /href = /a // //#T':state /href T' /a // then /keyword // // let /keyword te = idxNB(packedTable, // //#index:state:int /href index /a.state),
// if /keyword inputi // //#=:word:word:boolean /href = /a match.te // then /keyword next(stk, Sstate.te, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1, idxNB(myinput, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1), result, faili, failresult)
// else /keyword next(stk, Fstate.te, i, inputi, result, faili, failresult)/block // else /keyword //{match non Terminal}

// assert /keyword // //#action:state:state /href action /a.action.te // //#/href ∈ /a [// //#/href NT /a, // //#/href NT* /a] // report /keyword //"PROBLEM PEG:(state)"/literal
// let /keyword newstk = push(stk, frame(Sstate.te, Fstate.te, i, result, faili, failresult)),
// let /keyword tmp = //[// //#toAttribute:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word /href toAttribute /a(result // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a n.result, empty:seq.word)], /block next(newstk, // //#nextState:state:state /href nextState /a.action.te, i, inputi, tmp, i, tmp), /block /block resultType.push(stk, frame(state, state, i, result, n.myinput, result))

// // symbolMode /id Module /keyword symbolMode

use seq.attribute

use seq.boolean

use mytype

use seq1.mytype

use set.mytype

use standard

use seq.symbol

use seq1.symbol

use set.symbol

use symbol1

use token

use seq.word

Export /keyword text(attribute) seq.word

Export /keyword types(attribute) seq.mytype

Function // symbolparse:seq.word:set.mytype:modref:attribute /id // #symbolMode /href /a symbolparse(input:seq.word, types:set.mytype, modname:modref) attribute
// let /keyword r = // // //#parse:seq.word:attribute:commonType:recoverInfo /href parse /a(// input
, attribute(empty:seq.mytype, //""/literal)
, commonType(types, // //#isAbstract:modref:boolean /href isAbstract /a.modname, input)/block)/block // assert /keyword // //#status:recoverInfo:word /href status /a.r ∉ //"Failed"/literal
// //#∧:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∧ /a (input // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1 // //#/href ∈ /a //"function Function"/literal
// //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a i.// //#/href top /a.stk.r // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a n.input // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1) // report /keyword // //#errormessage:seq.word:seq.word:int:seq.word /href errormessage /a(//"Syntax error"/literal, input, i.// //#/href top /a.stk.r),
// //#result:recoverInfo:attribute /href result /a.r

function // addpara:commonType:seq.word:attribute:int:attribute /id // #symbolMode /href /a addpara(common:commonType, name:seq.word, typ:attribute, place:int) attribute
attribute(//[// //#resolvetype:seq.word:commonType:int:mytype /href resolvetype /a(text.typ, common, place)]
, name /block)

function // resolvetype:seq.word:commonType:int:mytype /id // #symbolMode /href /a resolvetype(text:seq.word, common:commonType, place:int) mytype
// let /keyword a = // //#resolvetype:set.mytype:seq.word:seq.mytype /href resolvetype /a(types.common, text)
// assert /keyword // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.isempty.a // report /keyword // //#errormessage:seq.word:seq.word:int:seq.word /href errormessage /a(//"cannot resolve type:(text)"/literal, input.common, place),
a // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1

function // errormessage:seq.word:seq.word:int:seq.word /id // #symbolMode /href /a errormessage(mess:seq.word, input:seq.word, place:int) seq.word
// //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(input, 1, place)
// //#/href+/a // //#red:seq.word:seq.word /href red /a.mess
// //#/href+/a input // //#<<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a place

function // toAttribute:attribute:seq.word:attribute /id // #symbolMode /href /a toAttribute(a:attribute, s:seq.word) attribute attribute(empty:seq.mytype, s)

type attribute is types:seq.mytype, text:seq.word

function // createfunc:commonType:int:seq.word:attribute:attribute:attribute:attribute /id // #symbolMode /href /a createfunc(
common:commonType
, place:int
, funcname:seq.word
, nametype:attribute
, PL:attribute
, functypebind:attribute
) attribute

, funcname // //#/href+/a text.nametype /block)/block // else /keyword attribute(paralist // //#/href+/a returntype, funcname)

common:commonType
, name:attribute
, PL:attribute
, place:int
) attribute

function // null:attribute /id // #symbolMode /href /a null attribute attribute(empty:seq.mytype, //""/literal)

function //+:attribute:attribute:attribute /id // #symbolMode /href /a +(a:attribute, b:attribute) attribute
attribute(types.a // //#/href+/a types.b, text.a // //#/href+/a text.b)

Non-terminals:Comment FP FPL FPL' Header Id N SymbolMode Type
Terminals:(),.. :]any is type{}
SymbolMode ← type Id is FPL Comment / any Header

FPL ← FP FPL'

FP ← any:Type / Type
Type ← Id.Type / Id
Id ← !, !]!{!(!)!:!. any
* Comment ←{N}
* N ←{N}/ !{!}any

, //"}"/literal /block)
, {56}
tableEntry(// // //#/href T /a
, //"}"/literal // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1

, // //#!T:int:state /href !T /a.57

, //"any"/literal /block)/block]

Sstate:state
, Fstate:state
, i:int
, result:seq.attribute
, faili:int
, failresult:seq.attribute

// // parser /id Module /keyword parser

use PEGrules

use UTF8

use seq.bindinfo

use seq.char

use mytype

use pretty

type commonType is types:set.mytype, outText:boolean, input:seq.word

Function // parser:seq.word:symboldict:set.mytype:boolean:seq.symbol /id // #parser /href /a parser(
input:seq.word
, dict:symboldict
, types:set.mytype
, outText:boolean
) seq.symbol
//{OPTION XPROFILE}/comment
// let /keyword b = bindinfo(dict, empty:seq.symbol, empty:seq.mytype, //""/literal)
// let /keyword tokens = // //#totokens:seq.word:seq.token /href totokens /a.input
// let /keyword r = // //#parse:seq.token:bindinfo:commonType:recoverInfo /href parse /a(packed.tokens, b, commonType(types, outText, input))
// assert /keyword // //#status:recoverInfo:word /href status /a.r // //#/href ∈ /a //"Match"/literal // report /keyword // //#errormessage:seq.word:recoverInfo:seq.word /href errormessage /a(//"syntax error"/literal, recoverInfo(// //#/href pop /a.stk.r, tokens, i.// //#/href top /a.stk.r, 1)),
code.// //#result:recoverInfo:bindinfo /href result /a.r

function // toAttribute:bindinfo:seq.word:bindinfo /id // #parser /href /a toAttribute(b:bindinfo, w:seq.word) bindinfo
bindinfo(dict.b, empty:seq.symbol, empty:seq.mytype, w)

function // toAttribute:bindinfo:seq.token:bindinfo /id // #parser /href /a toAttribute(b:bindinfo, t:seq.token) bindinfo
// for /keyword w = //""/literal, e ∈ t // do /keyword w // //#/href+/a // //#toword:token:word /href toword /a.e,
bindinfo(dict.b, empty:seq.symbol, empty:seq.mytype, w)

function // errormessage:seq.word:recoverInfo:seq.word /id // #parser /href /a errormessage(message:seq.word, rinfo:recoverInfo) seq.word
// let /keyword input = input.rinfo
// let /keyword place = place.rinfo
// let /keyword ending = // //#recoveryEnding:recoverInfo:seq.word /href recoveryEnding /a.rinfo
// let /keyword pp = // // //#prettyNoChange:seq.word:seq.word /href prettyNoChange /a(// // //#towords:seq.token:seq.word /href towords /a.// //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(input, 1, place // //#/href-/a 1)
// //#/href+/a ending /block)/block // for /keyword // idx = n.pp
, remove = ending
, addback = //""/literal
, go = // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.isempty.ending
, e ∈ // //#reverse:seq.T:seq.T /href reverse /a.pp /block // while /keyword go
// do /keyword // // if /keyword e // //#=:word:word:boolean /href = /a // //#last:seq.T:T /href last /a.remove // then /keyword next(idx // //#/href-/a 1, remove // //#>>:seq.T:int:seq.T /href >> /a 1, addback, n.remove // //#>:int:int:boolean /href > /a 1)
// else /keyword // // assert /keyword true // report /keyword //"ERR DEBUG:(// //#showZ:seq.word:seq.word /href showZ /a.remove)/sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp:(// //#showZ:seq.word:seq.word /href showZ /a.pp)"/literal,
// if /keyword e // //#/href ∈ /a //" /tag </span>:(// //#escapeformat:word /href escapeformat /a)"/literal // then /keyword next(idx // //#/href-/a 1, remove, [e] // //#/href+/a addback, go)
// else /keyword if e
// //#/href ∈ /a //" /tag </span> /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
,"/literal // then /keyword next(idx // //#/href-/a 1, remove, addback, go)
// else /keyword next(idx // //#/href-/a 1, remove, addback, false)/block /block // let /keyword t = // //":(// //#red:seq.word:seq.word /href red /a.message)/sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp:(// //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(pp, 1, idx))"/literal /block // for /keyword // unprocessed = //""/literal
, e ∈ // //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(input, place, // //#min:int:int:int /href min /a(place // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 10, n.input // //#/href-/a 1))/block // do /keyword unprocessed // //#/href+/a // //#toword:token:word /href toword /a.e,
(// if /keyword // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.isempty.t
// //#∧:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∧ /a // //#last:seq.T:T /href last /a.t // //#/href ∈ /a //" /tag </span>"/literal // then /keyword t // //#>>:seq.T:int:seq.T /href >> /a 1 // //#/href+/a addback
// else /keyword t // //#/href+/a addback)
// //#/href+/a //"/sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp:(// //#red:seq.word:seq.word /href red /a.message)/sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp"/literal
// //#/href+/a (// if /keyword isempty.unprocessed // then /keyword //"at end but expecting::(ending)"/literal
// else /keyword // //"Replaced:(// //#/href dq /a(// // if /keyword place // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 11 // //#<:int:int:boolean /href < /a n.input // then /keyword unprocessed // //#/href+/a //"…"/literal
// else /keyword unprocessed /block))with:(ending)to parse."/literal /block)

// let /keyword op = // //#toword:token:word /href toword /a.firsttoken,
bindinfo(// dict.R0
, code.R0 // //#/href+/a code.R1
, types.R0 // //#/href+/a types.R1
, text.R0 // //#/href+/a text.R1 // //#/href+/a op // //#/href+/a // //#%:int:seq.word /href % /a.n.code.R1 /block)

, arg2code
, [// //#Litfalse:symbol /href Litfalse /a]
, // //#typeboolean:mytype /href typeboolean /a /block)/block // else /keyword // // //#ifthenelse:seq.symbol:seq.symbol:seq.symbol:mytype:seq.symbol /href ifthenelse /a(// arg1code
, [// //#Littrue:symbol /href Littrue /a]
, arg2code
, // //#typeboolean:mytype /href typeboolean /a /block), /block /block next(code, [// //#typeboolean:mytype /href typeboolean /a], start // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a len, ops // //#<<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a 2)/block // else /keyword // // let /keyword idx = // //#findindex:seq.T:T:int /href findindex /a(//"≠ ≥ ≤ ∉"/literal, op // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1)

, op

, // //#resulttype:symbol:mytype /href resulttype /a.f1 /block)/block]/block // else /keyword [f1, // //#NotOp:symbol /href NotOp /a], /block /block next(// arg1code // //#/href+/a arg2code // //#/href+/a f
, [// //#resulttype:symbol:mytype /href resulttype /a.f // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1]
, start // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a len
, ops // //#<<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a 2 /block), /block /block bindinfo(dict, arg1code, arg1type, //""/literal)/block

function // strExp:commonType:bindinfo:seq.word:boolean:seq.symbol:mytype:recoverInfo:bindinfo /id // #parser /href /a strExp(
static:commonType
, R0:bindinfo
, str:seq.word
, forcecode:boolean
, expcode:seq.symbol
, exptype:mytype
, rinfo:recoverInfo

// if /keyword isempty.expcode // then /keyword // // if /keyword isempty.code.R0 // then /keyword // // if /keyword forcecode // then /keyword bindinfo(dict.R0, [// //#Words:seq.word:symbol /href Words /a(text.R0 // //#/href+/a str)], [t], //""/literal)
// else /keyword bindinfo(dict.R0, code.R0, types.R0, text.R0 // //#/href+/a str)/block // else /keyword if isempty.str // then /keyword R0
// else /keyword // // let /keyword f = // //#lookupbysig:commonType:symboldict:seq.word:seq.mytype:recoverInfo:symbol /href lookupbysig /a(static, dict.R0, //"+"/literal, [t, t], rinfo),

, paratypes
, // //#typeint:mytype /href typeint /a /block)/block /block // let /keyword f0 = // //#lookupbysig:symboldict:symbol:set.symbol /href lookupbysig /a(dict, sym3)

// else /keyword // // for /keyword // bound = // //#empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.symbol /a
, unbound = // //#empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.symbol /a
, sy ∈ toseq.f0 /block // do /keyword // // if /keyword // //#isunbound:symbol:boolean /href isunbound /a.sy // then /keyword next(bound, unbound // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a sy)
// else /keyword next(bound // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a sy, unbound), /block // if /keyword // //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.bound
// //#∧:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∧ /a // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.// //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.unbound // then /keyword{Allow multiple unbound with same signature}// //#subseq:set.T:int:int:set.T /href subseq /a(unbound, 1, 1)
// else /keyword bound /block /block // assert /keyword // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.// //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.f // report /keyword // // if /keyword n.name // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a 1
// //#∧:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∧ /a name // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1 // //#/href ∈ /a //"if else then for"/literal // then /keyword // //#errormessage:seq.word:recoverInfo:seq.word /href errormessage /a(//"Syntax error"/literal, rinfo)
// else /keyword // // //#errormessage:seq.word:recoverInfo:seq.word /href errormessage /a(// //"cannot find 1:((// if /keyword n.name // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a 1 // then /keyword name
// else /keyword //[name // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1, //":"/literal // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1]
// //#/href+/a name // //#<<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a 1 /block))(:(// for /keyword acc = //""/literal, @e ∈ paratypes
// do /keyword acc // //#/href+/a // //#%:mytype:seq.word /href % /a.@e // //#/href+/a //","/literal,
acc // //#>>:seq.T:int:seq.T /href >> /a 1))"/literal
, rinfo /block)/block /block // assert /keyword // //#n:set.T:int /href n /a.f // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a 1 // report /keyword // // //#errormessage:seq.word:recoverInfo:seq.word /href errormessage /a(// //"found more than one:(// for /keyword acc = //""/literal, @e ∈ toseq.f
// do /keyword acc // //#/href+/a library.module.@e // //#/href+/a //"."/literal // //#/href+/a // //#%:symbol:seq.word /href % /a.@e,
acc)"/literal
, rinfo /block)/block // let /keyword discard = // // for /keyword // acc = 0
, sym2 ∈ // //#requires:symboldict:symbol:seq.symbol /href requires /a(dict, f // //#sub:set.T:int:T /href sub /a 1)/block // do /keyword // // let /keyword xxx = // //#lookupbysig:symboldict:symbol:set.symbol /href lookupbysig /a(dict, sym2)
// assert /keyword // // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.// //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.xxx

0, /block 0, /block f // //#sub:set.T:int:T /href sub /a 1

, // //#Fref:symbol:symbol /href Fref /a.dcws
, // //#Fref:symbol:symbol /href Fref /a.// //#last:seq.T:T /href last /a.code.exp /block]

, // //#Fref:symbol:symbol /href Fref /a.// //#last:seq.T:T /href last /a.code.exp /block]
// //#/href+/a // //#Record:seq.mytype:symbol /href Record /a(//[// // //#typeint:mytype /href typeint /a
, // //#typeint:mytype /href typeint /a
, // //#typeint:mytype /href typeint /a /block]

, //"createthreadZ"/literal
, [// //#typeptr:mytype /href typeptr /a]
, processtype /block), /block bindinfo(// dict
, // if /keyword outText.static // then /keyword code.exp // //#/href+/a // //#symbol:modref:seq.word:seq.mytype:mytype:symbol /href symbol /a(// //#internalmod:modref /href internalmod /a, //"process"/literal, [rt], rt)
// else /keyword newcode
, [processtype]
, //""/literal /block)/block // else /keyword if // //#hexOrDecimal?:word:word /href hexOrDecimal? /a.op // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1
// //#/href ∈ /a //"hex decimal"/literal

, //"makereal"/literal
, [// //#seqof:mytype:mytype /href seqof /a.// //#typeword:mytype /href typeword /a]
, // //#typereal:mytype /href typereal /a /block), /block bindinfo(// dict
, [// // //#Words:seq.word:symbol /href Words /a(op // //#/href+/a //"."/literal // //#/href+/a dec)
, makerealSymbol /block]
, [// //#typereal:mytype /href typereal /a]

<<<< Below is auto generated code >>>>


Non-terminals:AccumList AccumList' And And' Atom Compare Compare' Declare Declare' E EL' FP FPL FPL' ForDeclare IF Id N Name Or Or' Parser Power Power' Product Product' String String' Sum Sum' Type Unary comma? str2
Terminals:()*+,-.= >[]any assert colon do dq else for function if let report sup then while{}∈ ∧ ∨
Parser ← function Name(FPL)Type Declare' E / function Name Type Declare' E
String ← dq String' dq
* String' ← colon(E)/ colon / str2
+str2 ← ! dq ! colon any
E ← Or
* EL' ←, E
Or ← And Or'
* Or' ← ∨ And
And ← Compare And'
* And' ← ∧ Compare
Compare ← Sum Compare'
* Compare' ← > Sum
Sum ← Product Sum'
* Sum' ←+Product
Product ← Unary Product'
* Product' ← * Unary
Unary ←-Unary / Id.Unary /{N}Unary / Power
Power ← Atom Power'
* Power' ← sup Unary
Atom ←(E)/[E EL']/ String / Declare Declare' E / if E then E IF else E / Name(E EL')/ Name
Name ← Id colon Type / Id
Id ← ! dq any
comma? ←, /
* IF ← else if E then E
Type ← Id.Type / Id
Declare ← let any = E comma? / assert E report E comma? /{N}comma? / for ForDeclare do E comma? / for ForDeclare while E do E comma?
ForDeclare ← AccumList, any ∈ E / AccumList
AccumList ← ! while any = E AccumList'
* AccumList' ←, any = E
* Declare' ← Declare
FPL ← FP FPL'
* FPL' ←, FP
FP ← any colon Type / Type
* N ←{N}/ !}any

function // =:seq.word:bindinfo:boolean /id // #parser /href /a =(seq.word, bindinfo) boolean true

function // $:int:bindinfo /id // #parser /href /a $(int) bindinfo empty:seq.bindinfo // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1

// // backparse /id Module /keyword backparse

use standard

use seq1.symbol

use symbol1

Function // backparse3:seq.symbol:int:boolean:int /id // #backparse /href /a backparse3(s:seq.symbol, ii:int, includeDefine:boolean) int
// let /keyword i = // if /keyword true // then /keyword // //#addDefine:seq.symbol:int:int /href addDefine /a(s, ii) // else /keyword ii
// assert /keyword i // //#>:int:int:boolean /href > /a 0 // report /keyword //"back parse 1a::(s):(stacktrace)"/literal
// let /keyword kind = // //#kind:symbol:symbolKind /href kind /a.s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a i,
// if /keyword kind // //#=:symbolKind:symbolKind:boolean /href = /a // //#kendblock:symbolKind /href kendblock /a // then /keyword // //#matchblock:seq.symbol:int:int:int /href matchblock /a(s, i // //#/href-/a 1, 0)
// else /keyword // // let /keyword i1 = // // if /keyword kind // //#=:symbolKind:symbolKind:boolean /href = /a // //#kjmp:symbolKind /href kjmp /a // then /keyword i // //#/href-/a // //#value:symbol:int /href value /a.s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a i
// else /keyword i /block // for /keyword // k = i1
, j ∈ // //#constantseq:int:T:seq.T /href constantseq /a(// //#nopara:symbol:int /href nopara /a.s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a i1, 1)/block // do /keyword // //#backparse3:seq.symbol:int:boolean:int /href backparse3 /a(s, k // //#/href-/a 1, includeDefine),
// if /keyword includeDefine // then /keyword // //#addDefine:seq.symbol:int:int /href addDefine /a(s, k) // else /keyword k /block

function // matchblock:seq.symbol:int:int:int /id // #backparse /href /a matchblock(s:seq.symbol, i:int, nest:int) int
// let /keyword sym = s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a i
// let /keyword kind = // //#kind:symbol:symbolKind /href kind /a.sym
// let /keyword newnest = // // if /keyword kind // //#/href ∈ /a [// //#kloop:symbolKind /href kloop /a, // //#kstart:symbolKind /href kstart /a] // then /keyword nest // //#/href-/a 1
// else /keyword if kind // //#=:symbolKind:symbolKind:boolean /href = /a // //#kendblock:symbolKind /href kendblock /a // then /keyword nest // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1
// else /keyword nest, /block // if /keyword nest // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a 0 // then /keyword // // if /keyword kind // //#=:symbolKind:symbolKind:boolean /href = /a // //#kloop:symbolKind /href kloop /a // then /keyword // // for /keyword // k = i
, j ∈ // //#constantseq:int:T:seq.T /href constantseq /a(// //#nopara:symbol:int /href nopara /a.sym, 1)/block // do /keyword // //#backparse3:seq.symbol:int:boolean:int /href backparse3 /a(s, k // //#/href-/a 1, false),
k /block // else /keyword if kind // //#=:symbolKind:symbolKind:boolean /href = /a // //#kstart:symbolKind /href kstart /a // then /keyword // //#addDefine:seq.symbol:int:int /href addDefine /a(s, i)
// else /keyword // //#matchblock:seq.symbol:int:int:int /href matchblock /a(s, i // //#/href-/a 1, newnest)/block // else /keyword // //#matchblock:seq.symbol:int:int:int /href matchblock /a(s, i // //#/href-/a 1, newnest)

function // addDefine:seq.symbol:int:int /id // #backparse /href /a addDefine(s:seq.symbol, i:int) int
// if /keyword i // //#>:int:int:boolean /href > /a 1

// // token /id Module /keyword token

use bits

use kernal

use standard

use encoding.tkn

use seq1.tkn

use seq.token

type token is value:bits

Function // %:token:seq.word /id // #token /href /a %(t:token) seq.word //"Tok:([// //#toword:token:word /href toword /a.t])"/literal

function // token:word:int:token /id // #token /href /a token(w:word, b:int) token
token(// // //#tobits:int:bits /href tobits /a.b // //#<<:bits:int:bits /href << /a 32
// //#∨:bits:bits:bits /href ∨ /a // //#tobits:int:bits /href tobits /a.rawvalue.w /block)

function // token:seq.word:int:token /id // #token /href /a token(w:seq.word, b:int) token
// //#token:word:int:token /href token /a(w // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1, b)

Function // toword:token:word /id // #token /href /a toword(t:token) word word.toint(value.t // //#∧:bits:bits:bits /href ∧ /a // //#mask:int:bits /href mask /a.32)

Function // towords:seq.token:seq.word /id // #token /href /a towords(s:seq.token) seq.word
// for /keyword acc = //""/literal, e ∈ s // do /keyword acc // //#/href+/a // //#toword:token:word /href toword /a.e,
acc

function // eqvclass:token:int /id // #token /href /a eqvclass(t:token) int toint(value.t // //#>>:bits:int:bits /href >> /a 32)

type tkn is w:word, token:token

function // =:tkn:tkn:boolean /id // #token /href /a =(a:tkn, b:tkn) boolean w.a // //#=:word:word:boolean /href = /a w.b

function // hash:tkn:int /id // #token /href /a hash(a:tkn) int // //#hash:word:int /href hash /a.w.a

Function // addprec:seq.word:boolean:seq.word /id // #token /href /a addprec(str:seq.word, internal:boolean) seq.word
// for /keyword precedence = 0, e ∈ str
// do /keyword // // if /keyword e // //#/href ∈ /a //"for"/literal // then /keyword precedence
// else /keyword if e // //#/href ∈ /a //"precedence"/literal // then /keyword -1
// else /keyword if precedence // //#<:int:int:boolean /href < /a 0 // then /keyword // // if /keyword e // //#/href ∈ /a //"1 3 4 5 6 7 20 30 31 32 33 34 35 36 37 11"/literal // then /keyword // //#toint:word:int /href toint /a.e
// else /keyword // // let /keyword prec = // //#opprec:word:int /href opprec /a.e
// assert /keyword prec // //#/href ∈ /a [1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7] // report /keyword //":(e)does not have a precedence"/literal,
prec /block /block // else /keyword // // assert /keyword // // //#eqvclass:token:int /href eqvclass /a.token.// //#decode:encoding.T:T /href decode /a.// //#encode:T:encoding.T /href encode /a.tkn(e, // //#token:word:int:token /href token /a(e, precedence))
// //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a precedence /block // report /keyword // //":(e)has already been given a different precedence: /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
:(str)"/literal, /block precedence, /block /block //""/literal

Function // tknencoding:seq.word /id // #token /href /a tknencoding seq.word
// let /keyword str = // //"precedence 20 Function function precedence 1 sub sup precedence 3 for * / >> << mod ∩ ∪ \ precedence 4+-∈ ∉ precedence 5 = > < ≠ ≥ ≤ precedence 6 ∧ precedence 7 ∨ ⊻ precedence 11 $mergecode precedence 30, precedence 31.precedence 32:"/literal
+ //"precedence 33(precedence 34)precedence 35[precedence 36]precedence 37"/literal
// //#/href+/a // //#/href dq /a // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1, /block // //#addprec:seq.word:boolean:seq.word /href addprec /a(str // //#/href+/a //"precedence+for ∈ ∉"/literal, true)

Function // opprec:word:int /id // #token /href /a opprec(a:word) int
// let /keyword k = // //#findencode:T:seq.T /href findencode /a.tkn(a, // //#token:word:int:token /href token /a(a, 0)),
// if /keyword isempty.k // then /keyword 0 // else /keyword // //#eqvclass:token:int /href eqvclass /a.token.k // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1

function // %:tkn:seq.word /id // #token /href /a %(a:tkn) seq.word
//":(w.a):(// //#toword:token:word /href toword /a.token.a):(// //#eqvclass:token:int /href eqvclass /a.token.a)"/literal

Function // totoken:word:token /id // #token /href /a totoken(w:word) token
// let /keyword z = // //#findencode:T:seq.T /href findencode /a.tkn(w, // //#token:word:int:token /href token /a(w, 0)),
// if /keyword isempty.z // then /keyword token.// //#tobits:int:bits /href tobits /a.rawvalue.w
// else /keyword token.z // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1

Function // =:token:token:boolean /id // #token /href /a =(a:token, b:token) boolean
// if /keyword value.a // //#=:bits:bits:boolean /href = /a value.b // then /keyword true
// else /keyword if value.a // //#>>:bits:int:bits /href >> /a 32 // //#=:bits:bits:boolean /href = /a 0x0 // then /keyword false
// else /keyword value.a // //#>>:bits:int:bits /href >> /a 32 // //#=:bits:bits:boolean /href = /a value.b // //#>>:bits:int:bits /href >> /a 32

Function // totokens:seq.word:seq.token /id // #token /href /a totokens(s:seq.word) seq.token
// for /keyword p2 = empty:seq.token, e ∈ s // do /keyword p2 // //#/href+/a // //#totoken:word:token /href totoken /a.e,
p2

Export /keyword type:token

// // baseTypeCheck /id Module /keyword baseTypeCheck

use seq1.mytype

use stack.mytype

use standard

use seq.symbol

use set.symbol

use symbol1

use set.typemap

use process.seq.word

function // coretype:mytype:typedict:mytype /id // #baseTypeCheck /href /a coretype(typ:mytype, alltypes:typedict) mytype
// let /keyword b = // //#basetype:mytype:typedict:mytype /href basetype /a(typ, alltypes),
// if /keyword // //#isseq:mytype:boolean /href isseq /a.b // then /keyword // //#typeptr:mytype /href typeptr /a
// else /keyword b

type typemap is key:int, value:mytype

function // lookup:set.typemap:int:set.typemap /id // #baseTypeCheck /href /a lookup(a:set.typemap, key:int) set.typemap
lookup(a, typemap(key, // //#typeint:mytype /href typeint /a))

Function // >1:typemap:typemap:ordering /id // #baseTypeCheck /href /a >1(a:typemap, b:typemap) ordering key.a // //#>1:int:int:ordering /href >1 /a key.b

Function // baseTypeCheck:seq.symdef:typedict:seq.word /id // #baseTypeCheck /href /a baseTypeCheck(prg:seq.symdef, typedict:typedict) seq.word
// for /keyword acc = empty:seq.word, count = 0, s ∈ prg

function // finishmodule:seq.word:boolean:boolean:boolean:midpoint:set.myExport:seq.word:set.sym/modref:set.symbol:seq.seq.word:seq.word /id // #prettycompilerfront /href /a finishmodule(
modtext:seq.word

, ref4 ∈ toseq.// //#reconstruceUses:midpoint:word:set.symbol:set.sym/modref:seq.seq.word:set.modref /href reconstruceUses /a(m, modname, dict, exported, uses)/block // do /keyword uselist // //#/href+/a // //#%:modref:seq.word /href % /a.ref4,
uselist /block // else /keyword uses /block // for /keyword uselist1 = empty:seq.seq.word, u ∈ uselist0

uselist1

// //#/href+/a u // //#<<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a 1)/block // let /keyword uselist = // //#sortuse:seq.seq.word:seq.word:seq.seq.word /href sortuse /a(uselist1, //""/literal)
// let /keyword idx = // //#includecomment:seq.word:int /href includecomment /a.modtext,
// for /keyword newuses = //""/literal, e ∈ uselist // do /keyword newuses // //#/href+/a //"/sp /tag <h1 /tag > /nsp use"/literal // //#/href+/a e,
//"Module"/literal

function // TOC:seq.seq.word:seq.word:seq.seq.word /id // #prettycompilerfront /href /a TOC(input:seq.seq.word, html:seq.word) seq.seq.word

// do /keyword // // let /keyword a = // //#findindex:seq.T:T:int /href findindex /a(//"h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6"/literal, e),
// if /keyword a // //#>:int:int:boolean /href > /a n.h // then /keyword // if /keyword e // //#/href ∈ /a //"Module"/literal // then /keyword kinds // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a Module // else /keyword kinds // else /keyword kinds // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a a, /block // if /keyword // //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.kinds // then /keyword input
// else /keyword // // for /keyword acc = empty:seq.seq.word, toc = //""/literal, count = 1, lasth = 1, lastmod = 0, p ∈ input
// do /keyword // // let /keyword kind = // // if /keyword n.p // //#<:int:int:boolean /href < /a 2 // then /keyword n.h // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 2
// else /keyword if p // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1 // //#/href ∈ /a //"Module"/literal // then /keyword Module
// else /keyword // // let /keyword t = // //#findindex:seq.T:T:int /href findindex /a(h, // //#last:seq.T:T /href last /a.p),
// if /keyword t ≤ n.h // then /keyword t // else /keyword n.h // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 2, /block /block // if /keyword kind // //#>:int:int:boolean /href > /a n.h // //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a kind ∉ kinds // then /keyword next(acc // //#/href+/a p, toc, count, lasth, lastmod)
// else /keyword // // let /keyword tagname = // // if /keyword kind // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a Module // then /keyword p // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 2 // else /keyword // //#toword:int:word /href toword /a.count /block // let /keyword href = //""/literal,
// if /keyword kind // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a Module // then /keyword // // let /keyword newacc = acc // //#/href+/a p,
next(newacc, toc // //#/href+/a //"/sp /tag <a /sp href /nsp ="/nsp:(// //#/href merge /a(//"#"/literal // //#/href+/a tagname))"/tag > /nsp:(href):(p)/tag </a>"/literal, count // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1, lasth, 1)/block // else /keyword // next(// acc
// //#/href+/a //"/sp /tag <a /sp id /nsp ="/nsp:(// //#id:symbol:seq.word /href id /a.sym.sd)"/sp href /nsp ="/nsp # /nsp:(name.module.sym.sd)"/tag > /nsp:(p // //#>>:seq.T:int:seq.T /href >> /a 1):(// //#last:seq.T:T /href last /a.p)"/literal
, toc
// //#/href+/a // //#levelchange:int:seq.word /href levelchange /a(kind // //#/href-/a (lastmod // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a lasth))
// //#/href+/a //"/sp /tag <a /sp id /nsp ="/nsp:(tagname)"/tag > /nsp:(href):(p // //#>>:seq.T:int:seq.T /href >> /a 1)/tag </a>"/literal
, count // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1
, kind
, 0 /block), /block /block /block[toc // //#/href+/a // //#levelchange:int:seq.word /href levelchange /a(1 // //#/href-/a (lastmod // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a lasth))]

function // functionId:seq.word:seq.word /id // #prettycompilerfront /href /a functionId(p:seq.word) seq.word
//{???? need to get type when no parameters}/comment

// else /keyword // //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(p, 2, {2)+":"+subseq(p, 3,}j // //#/href-/a 1))

// //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 2 /block // while /keyword p // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a k // //#/href ∈ /a //"."/literal
// do /keyword k // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 2
// for /keyword // acc = //":"/literal
, last = p // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a (j // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1)
, e ∈ // //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(p, j // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 2, k // //#/href-/a 1)
// //#/href+/a //","/literal /block // do /keyword // // if /keyword e // //#/href ∈ /a //":"/literal // //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a last // //#/href ∈ /a //",:)"/literal // then /keyword next(acc, e)

// else /keyword next(acc // //#/href+/a last, e), /block acc // //#>>:seq.T:int:seq.T /href >> /a 1 /block), /block z /block // else /keyword //""/literal

function // print:set.autolink:seq.word /id // #prettycompilerfront /href /a print(s:set.autolink) seq.word
// for /keyword acc = //""/literal, e ∈ toseq.s // do /keyword acc // //#/href+/a id.e // //#/href+/a file.e // //#/href+/a //"/sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp"/literal,
acc

Function // transform2:midpoint:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word:boolean:boolean:seq.word:boolean:boolean:seq.file:seq.file:seq.word:seq.file /id // #prettycompilerfront /href /a transform2(
m:midpoint
, output:seq.word
, target:seq.word
, modrenames:seq.word
, bind:boolean
, reorguse:boolean
, html:seq.word
, cleanexports:boolean
, moveexports:boolean

// else /keyword // //#getpatterns:midpoint:seq.word:seq.patternType /href getpatterns /a(m, patternmods)/block // let /keyword srctext0 = // // if /keyword bind // then /keyword // // let /keyword changed = // //#changes:midpoint:seq.patternType:seq.symdef /href changes /a(m, patterns)

// let /keyword autolinks = // // if /keyword // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.isempty.link // then /keyword // //#getautolinks:midpoint:seq.file:set.autolink /href getautolinks /a(m, link)
// else /keyword // //#empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.autolink /a /block //{assert name.fn(input2 sub 1)∉"core"report"XX"+print.autolinks}/comment

// do /keyword // // if /keyword // //#paragraphno:symdef:int /href paragraphno /a.sd // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a 0 // then /keyword next(lastno, acc5)
// else /keyword // // let /keyword srctext2 = src // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a // //#paragraphno:symdef:int /href paragraphno /a.sd
// let /keyword isfunc = srctext2 // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1 // //#/href ∈ /a //"Function function"/literal

function // getautolinks:midpoint:seq.file:set.autolink /id // #prettycompilerfront /href /a getautolinks(m:midpoint, link:seq.file) set.autolink
//{this looks at the html files in link and creates autolink entries}/comment
// for /keyword autolinks0 = // //#empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.autolink /a, sd ∈ toseq.prg.m
// do /keyword // // if /keyword // //#paragraphno:symdef:int /href paragraphno /a.sd // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a 0 // then /keyword autolinks0
// else /keyword autolinks0 // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a autolink(// //#id:symbol:seq.word /href id /a.sym.sd, //""/literal)/block // for /keyword autolinks = autolinks0, f ∈ link
// do /keyword // // if /keyword ext.fn.f ∉ //"html"/literal // then /keyword autolinks
// else /keyword // // for /keyword // autolink1 = autolinks
, p1 ∈ // //#breakparagraph:seq.file:seq.seq.word /href breakparagraph /a.[f]/block // do /keyword // // if /keyword isempty.p1 // then /keyword autolink1
// else /keyword // // for /keyword autolink2 = autolink1, p ∈ // //#/href break /a(p1, //"<p>"/literal, false)
// do /keyword //{assert">Function</a>"sub 1 ∉ p report":(esc.subseq(p, 1, 4))hereyX:(esc.p)"}
// if /keyword // //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(p, 1, 4) ≠ //"<a id =:(// //#/href dq /a)"/literal
// //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a //">Function</a>"/literal // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1 ∉ p // then /keyword autolink2
// else /keyword // // let /keyword i = // //#findindex:seq.T:T:int /href findindex /a(p // //#<<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a 4, // //#/href dq /a // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1)
// let /keyword linkvalue = // //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(p, 4, i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 4)
// let /keyword tmp = // // //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.[autolink(linkvalue, //"../ /nsp"/literal // //#/href+/a // //#fullname:filename:word /href fullname /a.fn.f)]
// //#/href ∪ /a autolink2, /block //{assert isempty.find(autolink2, linkvalue)report":(linkvalue)herey:(esc.p)/sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
"+print.find(autolink2, linkvalue)+"/sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
"+print.find(tmp, linkvalue),}/comment
tmp, /block /block autolink2, /block /block autolink1, /block /block autolinks

done:set.symbol

// let /keyword new0 = // // for /keyword acc = empty:seq.symbol, sym ∈ toseq.toprocess
// do /keyword acc // //#/href+/a // //#getCode:set.symdef:symbol:seq.symbol /href getCode /a(prg, sym),
acc /block // let /keyword new1 = // // for /keyword acc = empty:seq.symbol, sym ∈ toseq.// //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.new0
// do /keyword // // let /keyword kind = // //#kind:symbol:symbolKind /href kind /a.sym,
// if /keyword // //#kind:symbol:symbolKind /href kind /a.sym
// //#/href ∈ /a // //#isOrdinary:seq.symbolKind /href isOrdinary /a
// //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a // //#kind:symbol:symbolKind /href kind /a.sym // //#/href ∈ /a [// //#kfref:symbolKind /href kfref /a] // then /keyword acc // //#/href+/a sym
// else /keyword acc, /block // //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.acc // //#\:set.T:set.T:set.T /href \ /a done /block // let /keyword new2 = // // //#requires:set.symbol:set.symdef:set.symbol:boolean:set.symbol /href requires /a(new1, templates, dict, true)
// //#\:set.T:set.T:set.T /href \ /a done
// //#/href ∪ /a new1, /block // if /keyword // //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.new2 // then /keyword done
// else /keyword // //#closeuse:set.symbol:set.symbol:set.symdef:set.symdef:set.symbol:set.symbol /href closeuse /a(done // //#/href ∪ /a toprocess, new2, prg, templates, dict)

function // ⊻:boolean:boolean:boolean /id // #prettycompilerfront /href /a ⊻(a:boolean, b:boolean) boolean
// if /keyword a // then /keyword // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.b // else /keyword b

// else /keyword // //#moduleref:seq.word:modref /href moduleref /a(//"*"/literal // //#/href+/a modname)/block // let /keyword include0 = // // for /keyword acc = // //#empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.symbol /a, sym ∈ exports

acc, /block // for /keyword // uses = [thismodule]

, included = include0
, symx ∈ toseq.uses6 /block // do /keyword // // if /keyword // //#isconstantorspecial:symbol:boolean /href isconstantorspecial /a.symx

// else /keyword // // let /keyword sym = symx,

, unhandled
, included // //#/href ∪ /a // //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.// //#exports:midpoint:modref:seq.symbol /href exports /a(m, inmod // //#sub:set.T:int:T /href sub /a 1)/block)/block // else /keyword next(uses, unhandled // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a inmod, included), /block /block /block // //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.// //#chooseUses:seq.modref:set.set.modref:word:seq.seq.word:set.sym/modref:seq.modref /href chooseUses /a(uses, unhandled, modname, olduses, exported)
// //#-:set.T:T:set.T /href-/a thismodule /block

function // chooseUses:seq.modref:set.set.modref:word:seq.seq.word:set.sym/modref:seq.modref /id // #reconstructUses /href /a chooseUses(
uses:seq.modref
, unhandled:set.set.modref

// else /keyword acc // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a para.u /block // for /keyword new = unhandled, t ∈ toseq.acc
// do /keyword new // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a // //#inModule:set.sym/modref:symbol:set.modref /href inModule /a(exported, // //#deepcopySym:mytype:symbol /href deepcopySym /a.t),
new /block //{now try and resolve unhandled module sets}/comment

, newuses = // //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.uses
, u ∈ toseq.in /block // do /keyword // // if /keyword // //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.u
// //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.// //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a(u // //#∩:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∩ /a newuses) // then /keyword{ignore empty sets and sets with one of the modules already in uses}next(acc, newuses)
// else /keyword if // //#n:set.T:int /href n /a.u // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a 1 // then /keyword{add the single modref to uses}next(acc, newuses // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a u // //#sub:set.T:int:T /href sub /a 1)
// else /keyword next(acc // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a u, newuses)/block // let /keyword tmp = // // if /keyword // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.// //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.acc // then /keyword // // for /keyword acc2 = empty:seq.modref, x ∈ toseq.acc // //#sub:set.T:int:T /href sub /a 1
// do /keyword // if /keyword // //#%:modref:seq.word /href % /a.x // //#/href ∈ /a olduses // then /keyword acc2 // //#/href+/a x // else /keyword acc2,
acc2 /block // else /keyword empty:seq.modref, /block // if /keyword n.tmp // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a 1 // then /keyword // // //#chooseUses:seq.modref:set.set.modref:word:seq.seq.word:set.sym/modref:seq.modref /href chooseUses /a(// toseq.newuses // //#/href+/a tmp // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1
, acc
, modname
, olduses
, exported /block)/block // else /keyword if // //#n:set.T:int /href n /a.newuses
// //#>:int:int:boolean /href > /a // //#n:set.T:int /href n /a.// //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.uses // then /keyword // //#chooseUses:seq.modref:set.set.modref:word:seq.seq.word:set.sym/modref:seq.modref /href chooseUses /a(toseq.newuses, acc, modname, olduses, exported)
// else /keyword toseq.newuses

// else /keyword acc2, /block acc2 /block /block // for /keyword acc = // //#empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.modref /a, e ∈ tmp

acc

uses5:set.symbol

) set.symbol

// //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a name.module.sym // //#/href ∈ /a //"$FOR internal"/literal
// //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a // //#isSimple:modref:boolean /href isSimple /a.module.sym // then /keyword acc

acc

function // removeseq:mytype:mytype /id // #reconstructUses /href /a removeseq(t:mytype) mytype

Function // includecomment:seq.word:int /id // #reconstructUses /href /a includecomment(modtext:seq.word) int
// for /keyword i = // //#findindex:seq.T:T:int /href findindex /a(modtext, //"/sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp"/literal // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1)
// while /keyword i // //#<:int:int:boolean /href < /a n.modtext
// //#∧:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∧ /a modtext // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a (i // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1)
∉ //"Function type function Export unbound Builtin builtin"/literal
// do /keyword // // //#findindex:seq.T:T:int /href findindex /a(modtext // //#<<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a i, //"/sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp"/literal // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1)
// //#+:int:int:int /href+/a i, /block i

function // showZ:seq.word:seq.word /id // #reconstructUses /href /a showZ(out:seq.word) seq.word
// for /keyword acc = //""/literal, w ∈ out
// do /keyword // acc
// //#/href+/a // //#encodeword:seq.char:word /href encodeword /a(// // //#decodeword:word:seq.char /href decodeword /a.w
// //#/href+/a // //#char1:seq.word:char /href char1 /a.//"Z"/literal /block), /block acc

function // replaceT:mytype:seq.symbol:set.symbol:seq.symbol /id // #reconstructUses /href /a replaceT(with:mytype, a:seq.symbol, dict:set.symbol) seq.symbol
// for /keyword acc = empty:seq.symbol, sym ∈ a
// do /keyword // // let /keyword b = // //#replaceTsymbol:mytype:symbol:symbol /href replaceTsymbol /a(with, sym)
// let /keyword k = // //#findelement2:set.T:T:set.T /href findelement2 /a(dict, b),
acc // //#/href+/a (// if /keyword // //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.k // then /keyword b // else /keyword k // //#sub:set.T:int:T /href sub /a 1), /block acc

// // frontcmd /id Module /keyword frontcmd.T

precedence > for >1 >2 >3 >4 >alpha

use baseTypeCheck

use file

use seq.file

use graphcode

use prettycompilerfront

use standard

use arc.symbol

use drawGraph.arc.symbol

use graph.arc.symbol

use set.arc.symbol

use set.symbol

use symbol1

use set.symdef

use drawGraph.arc.symloc

unbound /keyword compilerFront:T(seq.word, seq.file, seq.word, seq.word) midpoint

Function // front::T:seq.file:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word:boolean:seq.word:seq.file /id // #frontcmd /href /a front:T(
input:seq.file
, output:seq.word
, pass:seq.word
, n:seq.word
, ~n:seq.word
, mods:seq.word
, ~mods:seq.word
, within:boolean
, %:seq.word
) seq.file
//{COMMAND The /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp front /tag </strong> is a multiple-purpose command. It outputs data from various stages of the compiler. /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
One use is to determine which functions are used between modules. The usegraph of the core functions indicates there are dependencies between the modules texio, file and bits. To see the dependences, use /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp block front /sp+built core.libsrc mods: textio file bits format /tag </span> A graph will be displayed with the dependencies between the modules. The nodes in the graph are the procedure names. Since a name does not uniquely identify a function, hovering over the beginning of the name will pop up a more complete description beginning with the name of the function. /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
The dependence on the module bits will not be displayed. If an earlier pass of the compiler is specified like this /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp front  +built taubc.libsrc mods = textio file bits format pass = text /tag </span> then it will be displayed. /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
The dependence within the module textio can be seen with /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp front  +built taubc.libsrc mods = textio pass = text within = /tag </span> /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
To see all the functions that call functions /sp /tag <em /tag > /nsp named /tag </em> breakparagraph in the library use /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp front  +built taubc.libsrc n = breakparagraph pass = text out = calledby /tag </span> /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
This will list the function definitions in a package /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp front  +built taubc.libsrc mods = textio out = symdef /tag </span> The format is the function followed by a post order transversal of the call tree. /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
The front command takes several parameters that control which functions are considered./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp ○ /tag </strong> n a list of names of functions to include /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp ○ /tag </strong> ~n a list of names to exclude /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp ○ /tag </strong> mods a list of modules to include /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp ○ /tag </strong> ~mods a list of modules to exculde /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp ○ /tag </strong> pass The option pass determines how much processing is done before looking at the symbols. /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> library Only report on functions imported from libraries. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> text Parse the input in such a way that the source code can be reconstructed./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> pass1 Output from first stage of processing. All bindings of text to symbols have been done./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> pass1a Like pass1 with Compiler options on Export statements added. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> pass2 After some optimization /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> all Just before code generation /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp. /tag </span>
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp ○ /tag </strong> % The option % determines the format of the output. /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> sym Just the symbol names /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> symdef The symbol definitions. The format is the symbol followed by a post order transversal of the call tree./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> symdefgraph For each symbol definition, the definition is presented as a call tree graph./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> calledby The option n is ignored in building a call graph. Then only the symbols that • call symbols in n directly or indirectly are included in the graph /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> calls The option n is ignored in building a call graph. Then only the symbols that • are called(directly or indirectly)from symbols in n are included in the graph./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> txt Instead of producing a SVG graph print the args of the graph./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> baseTypeCheck /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • /tag </strong> /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp resultCheck /tag </span>}/comment
// let /keyword cf = // //#compilerFront::T:seq.word:seq.file:seq.word:seq.word:midpoint /href compilerFront:T /a(// if /keyword isempty.pass // then /keyword //"pass2"/literal // else /keyword pass, input, //"*"/literal, //""/literal)
// let /keyword out = %
// let /keyword names = n
// let /keyword prg = prg.cf
// let /keyword ignorenames = isempty.names // //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a out // //#/href ∈ /a [//"calls"/literal, //"calledby"/literal]

, // if /keyword // //#name:symbol:word /href name /a.ss // //#/href ∈ /a names // then /keyword root // //#/href+/a ss // else /keyword root /block)/block // else /keyword next(selected, root)/block // let /keyword txt = // // if /keyword out = //"sym"/literal // then /keyword // // for /keyword txt = //""/literal, i ∈ selected
// do /keyword txt // //#/href+/a //"/sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp"/literal // //#/href+/a // //#%:symbol:seq.word /href % /a.sym.i,
txt /block // else /keyword if out = //"symdef"/literal // then /keyword // // for /keyword txt = //""/literal, sd1 ∈ selected
// do /keyword // // let /keyword kk = // //#options:symdef:symdefOption /href options /a.sd1,
txt

// //#/href+/a // //#%:seq.T:seq.word /href % /a.code.sd1, /block txt /block // else /keyword if out = //"symdefgraph"/literal // then /keyword // // for /keyword txt = //""/literal, sd1 ∈ selected
// do /keyword // txt

// else /keyword if out = //"resultCheck"/literal // then /keyword // //#checkresults:seq.symdef:seq.word /href checkresults /a.toseq.prg
// else /keyword // // let /keyword syms = // // for /keyword acc = // //#empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.symbol /a, sd5 ∈ selected
// do /keyword acc // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a sym.sd5,
acc /block // let /keyword g = // // for /keyword acc = empty:seq.arc.symbol, sd1 ∈ selected
// do /keyword // // for /keyword // acc2 = acc
, h ∈ toseq(// //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.code.sd1 // //#∩:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∩ /a syms)/block // do /keyword // // if /keyword sym.sd1 // //#=:symbol:symbol:boolean /href = /a h
// //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.within // //#∧:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∧ /a module.sym.sd1 // //#=:modref:modref:boolean /href = /a module.h // then /keyword acc2
// else /keyword acc2 // //#/href+/a arc(sym.sd1, h), /block acc2, /block // //#newgraph:seq.T:graph.T /href newgraph /a.acc, /block // let /keyword g2 = // // if /keyword out // //#/href ∈ /a [//"calls"/literal, //"calledby"/literal] // then /keyword // // assert /keyword // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.// //#isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a(nodes.g // //#∩:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∩ /a // //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.root) // report /keyword //"no intersection between symbols in option n and call graph"/literal,
// //#subgraph:graph.T:set.<<.T:graph.T /href subgraph /a(// g
, // //#/href reachable /a(// // if /keyword out = //"calledby"/literal // then /keyword // //#complement:graph.T:graph.T /href complement /a.g // else /keyword g
, root /block)/block)/block // else /keyword g, /block // if /keyword out = //"text"/literal // then /keyword // // for /keyword txt = //"txt"/literal, a ∈ toseq.arcs.g
// do /keyword // txt
// //#/href+/a //"/sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp"/literal
// //#/href+/a // //#%:symbol:seq.word /href % /a.tail.a
// //#/href+/a // //#%:symbol:seq.word /href % /a.head.a, /block txt /block // else /keyword // // //#drawgraph:graph.T:seq.word /href drawgraph /a.// //#newgraph:seq.T:graph.T /href newgraph /a.toseq.arcs.g2, /block /block /block[// //#file:seq.word:seq.word:file /href file /a(output, txt)]

Function // transform::T:seq.file:seq.file:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word:boolean:boolean:seq.word:boolean:boolean:seq.word:seq.file /id // #frontcmd /href /a transform:T(
input:seq.file
, link:seq.file
, output:seq.word
, target:seq.word
, modrename:seq.word
, bind:boolean
, reorguse:boolean
, html:seq.word
, cleanexports:boolean
, moveexports:boolean
, patternmods:seq.word
) seq.file
//{COMMAND The /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp transform /tag </strong> cmd takes a list of input source files. For each module in the input, a pretty printed file is created in the directory <Tau>/tmp. Additional parameters allow for different variants. /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp transform+tests profileExample.ls helloworld.ls /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
transform+tests profileExample.ls reorguse:/sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
transform  +built profileExample.libsrc taubc.libinfo bind:/sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
transform  +built profileExample.libsrc taubc.libinfo bind: reorguse: /tag </span> /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
This first variant does not require the source to be semantically correct, but the syntax must be correct. It does not change the order of the paragraphs. /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
The second is like the first except that it moves the use paragraphs to the beginning of the module, removes duplicates, and sorts them./sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
The third is like the first but requires correct semantics. This allows some additional transformations such as /sp /tag <em /tag > /nsp not(a = b)/tag </em> to become /sp /tag <em /tag > /nsp a ≠ b /tag </em>. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
○ /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp target /tag </strong> overides default target directory tmp /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
○ /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp bind /tag </strong> Does further processing of input to bind id's to symbols./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
○ /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp reorguse /tag </strong> Reorganizes use clauses. If /sp /tag <em /tag > /nsp bind /tag </em> is also specified, unnecessary use clauses are removed./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
○ /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp link /tag </strong> A list of file names ending with /sp.html that will not be compiled but will be scanned for functions that are called by the files. Hyperlinks will be create from the location of the call to the definition in the link files. Files without a.html extenstion are ignored. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
○ /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp html /tag </strong> An html file is produced with an index of modules. This option is useful for examining source code and contains for producing documentation with imbedded Tau code.This options contains one or more of the following. /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp • Module /tag </strong> Include modules in the table of contents. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
• /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp headersOnly /tag </strong> Only include the headers of exported functions in result./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
• /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp h1 /tag </strong> include html h1 headers in table of contents /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
• /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp h2 /tag </strong> include html h2 headers in table of contents /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
• /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp h3 /tag </strong> include html h3 headers in table of contents /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
• /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp h4 /tag </strong> include html h4 headers in table of contents /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
• /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp h5 /tag </strong> include html h5 headers in table of contents /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
• /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp h6 /tag </strong> include html h6 headers in table of /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp contents /tag </span>
○ /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp modrename /tag </strong> List of modules to rename in form: oldname1 newname1 oldname2 newname2... /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
○ /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp patternmods /tag </strong> List of modules that contains patterns. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
See /sp /tag <a /sp href /nsp ="/nsp # /nsp patterns"/tag > /nsp Example /tag </a> /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
○ /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp cleanexports /tag </strong> Remove exports for exports in module or if Export is from another module add comment to indicate where it comes from./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
○ /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp moveexports /tag </strong> Move all exports to just after use clauses./sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
The /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp keyword"/tag > /nsp transform /tag </span> command treats the function genEnum as magic and will generate code in a module for enumeration types instead of creating the code by hand. /sp /tag <a /sp href /nsp ="/nsp # /nsp enum"/tag > /nsp genEnum Example /tag </a>}/comment
// let /keyword bind1 = // bind // //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.isempty.link // //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a cleanexports // //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a moveexports /block // let /keyword m = // // if /keyword bind1 // then /keyword // //#compilerFront::T:seq.word:seq.file:seq.word:seq.word:midpoint /href compilerFront:T /a(//"text"/literal, input, //""/literal, //""/literal)
// else /keyword // //#empty::midpoint:midpoint /href empty:midpoint /a, /block // //#transform2:midpoint:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word:boolean:boolean:seq.word:boolean:boolean:seq.file:seq.file:seq.word:seq.file /href transform2 /a(// m
, output
, target
, modrename
, bind1
, reorguse
, // if /keyword isempty.link // then /keyword html // else /keyword html // //#/href+/a //"html"/literal
, cleanexports
, moveexports
, input
, link
, patternmods /block)

Function // unusedsymbols::T:seq.file:boolean:boolean:boolean:seq.word:seq.word /id // #frontcmd /href /a unusedsymbols:T(
input:seq.file
, all:boolean
, generated:boolean
, excessExports:boolean
, ignore:seq.word
) seq.word
//{COMMAND /sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp unusedsymbols /tag </strong> cmd analyzes code looking for unused functions. /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
It forms the function call graph for the program. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
It then looks for any sources in the call graph that are not the entry point of the program and lists them. Any functions that are generated from type definitions are also removed. /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
Here is an example tau /sp /tag <span /sp class /nsp ="/nsp block"/tag > /nsp tools unusedsymbols /sp+built tools.libsrc taubc.libinfo /tag </span> /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp
The behavior can be modified with flags. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
-/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp all /tag </strong> list all unused functions--not just the roots. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
-/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp generated /tag </strong> The symbols generated from type definitions are included. /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
-/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp excessExports /tag </strong> list symbols exported from a module but only used internally to that module./sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
-/sp /tag <strong /tag > /nsp ignore /tag </strong> Symbols with these names are not listed in the output. Default value is genEnum genPEG}/comment
// //#unusedsymbols2:midpoint:boolean:boolean:boolean:seq.word:seq.word /href unusedsymbols2 /a(// // //#compilerFront::T:seq.word:seq.file:seq.word:seq.word:midpoint /href compilerFront:T /a(//"text"/literal, input, //""/literal, //""/literal)
, all
, generated
, excessExports
, ignore /block)

// // graphcode /id Module /keyword graphcode

use standard

use seq.symbol

use symbol1

use arc.symloc

use graph.arc.symloc

use set.arc.symloc

use seq.symloc

use stack.symloc

Function // nodeLabel:symloc:seq.seq.word /id // #graphcode /href /a nodeLabel(node:symloc) seq.seq.word
// let /keyword t = // //#%:symbol:seq.word /href % /a.sym.node
// let /keyword t2 = // if /keyword t // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a n.t // //#/href ∈ /a //"/sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp"/literal // then /keyword t // //#>>:seq.T:int:seq.T /href >> /a 1 // else /keyword t,
[// //""/literal
, // //#node2text:symloc:seq.word /href node2text /a.node
, // //#%:int:seq.word /href % /a.loc.node // //#/href+/a t2 /block]

Function // %:symloc:seq.word /id // #graphcode /href /a %(symloc) seq.word //"????"/literal

Export /keyword type:symloc

type symloc is loc:int, sym:symbol

function // =:symloc:symloc:boolean /id // #graphcode /href /a =(a:symloc, b:symloc) boolean loc.a // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a loc.b

function // >1:symloc:symloc:ordering /id // #graphcode /href /a >1(a:symloc, b:symloc) ordering loc.a // //#>1:int:int:ordering /href >1 /a loc.b

Function // tograph:seq.symbol:graph.arc.symloc /id // #graphcode /href /a tograph(s:seq.symbol) graph.arc.symloc
// for /keyword // acc = empty:seq.arc.symloc
, stk = // //#empty::stack.T:stack.T /href empty:stack.symloc /a
, i ∈ // //#arithseq:int:T:T:seq.T /href arithseq /a(n.s, 1, 1)/block // do /keyword // // let /keyword sym = s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a i
// let /keyword sons = // // if /keyword sym // //#=:symbol:symbol:boolean /href = /a // //#EndBlock:symbol /href EndBlock /a // then /keyword // // for /keyword stk2 = stk, sons = empty:seq.symloc, k ∈ toseq.stk
// while /keyword // //#not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.// //#isempty:stack.T:boolean /href isempty /a.stk2

∉ [// //#kloop:symbolKind /href kloop /a, // //#kstart:symbolKind /href kstart /a]
// do /keyword next(// //#/href pop /a.stk2, sons // //#/href+/a // //#/href top /a.stk2),
sons // //#/href+/a // //#/href top /a.stk2 /block // else /keyword // // for /keyword // stk2 = stk
, sons = empty:seq.symloc
, count = // //#nopara:symbol:int /href nopara /a.sym
, k ∈ toseq.stk /block // while /keyword count // //#>:int:int:boolean /href > /a 0
// do /keyword // // let /keyword top = // //#/href top /a.stk2,
next(// // //#/href pop /a.stk2
, sons // //#/href+/a top
, // if /keyword // //#kind:symbol:symbolKind /href kind /a.sym.top // //#=:symbolKind:symbolKind:boolean /href = /a // //#kdefine:symbolKind /href kdefine /a // then /keyword count
// else /keyword count // //#/href-/a 1 /block), /block sons /block /block // let /keyword newstk = // //#/href pop /a(stk, n.sons),
// let /keyword tail = symloc(i, sym),
next(// // for /keyword arcs = acc, sy ∈ sons // do /keyword arcs // //#/href+/a arc(tail, sy),
arcs
, push(newstk, tail)/block), /block // //#newgraph:seq.T:graph.T /href newgraph /a.acc

Function // node2text:symloc:seq.word /id // #graphcode /href /a node2text(a:symloc) seq.word

// //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a kind // //#=:symbolKind:symbolKind:boolean /href = /a // //#klocal:symbolKind /href klocal /a // then /keyword // //#%:symbol:seq.word /href % /a.sy
// else /keyword [// //#name:symbol:word /href name /a.sy]

// // cleanExports /id Module /keyword cleanExports

/use seq1.myExport

use set.myExport

use seq1.mytype

use pretty

use standard

use seq.symbol

use symbol1

use set.symdef

use sort.seq.word

use seq1.word

use sort.word

Export /keyword type:myExport

type myExport is modname:word, sym:symbol, key:seq.word, org:seq.word, paragraphno:int

function // %:myExport:seq.word /id // #cleanExports /href /a %(e:myExport) seq.word
[modname.e]
// //#/href+/a key.e
// //#/href+/a // //#keyx:symbol:seq.word /href keyx /a.sym.e
// //#/href+/a (// if /keyword name.module.sym.e ≠ modname.e
// //#∧:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∧ /a (// //#%:modref:seq.word /href % /a.module.sym.e) // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1
∉ //"builtin internal"/literal // then /keyword // // let /keyword b = //"{From:(module.sym.e)}"/literal,
// if /keyword // //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(org.e, n.org.e // //#/href-/a n.b // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1, n.org.e)
= b // then /keyword org.e
// else /keyword org.e // //#/href+/a b /block // else /keyword org.e)

function // getExportName:seq.word:seq.word /id // #cleanExports /href /a getExportName(s:seq.word) seq.word
// if /keyword s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 3 ∉ //":"/literal // then /keyword [s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 2]
// else /keyword // // for /keyword // name = [s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 2, s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 3, s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 4]
, last = s // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 4
, w ∈ s // //#<<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a 4 /block // while /keyword last ∉ //"("/literal
// do /keyword // // if /keyword w // //#/href ∈ /a //"."/literal // //#∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a last // //#/href ∈ /a //"."/literal // then /keyword next(name // //#/href+/a w, w)
// else /keyword next(name, //"("/literal // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1), /block name /block

function // >2:myExport:myExport:ordering /id // #cleanExports /href /a >2(a:myExport, b:myExport) ordering modname.a // //#>1:word:word:ordering /href >1 /a modname.b

function // >1:myExport:myExport:ordering /id // #cleanExports /href /a >1(a:myExport, b:myExport) ordering
modname.a // //#>1:word:word:ordering /href >1 /a modname.b
// //#∧:ordering:ordering:ordering /href ∧ /a key.a // //#>1:seq.T:seq.T:ordering /href >1 /a key.b
// //#∧:ordering:ordering:ordering /href ∧ /a // //#keyx:symbol:seq.word /href keyx /a.sym.a // //#>1:seq.T:seq.T:ordering /href >1 /a // //#keyx:symbol:seq.word /href keyx /a.sym.a
// //#∧:ordering:ordering:ordering /href ∧ /a // //#%:symbol:seq.word /href % /a.sym.a // //#>1:seq.T:seq.T:ordering /href >1 /a // //#%:symbol:seq.word /href % /a.sym.b

function // keyx:symbol:seq.word /id // #cleanExports /href /a keyx(s:symbol) seq.word
// if /keyword // //#nopara:symbol:int /href nopara /a.s // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a 1 // then /keyword //[// // //#/href merge /a.// //#%:mytype:seq.word /href % /a.(// //#paratypes:symbol:seq.mytype /href paratypes /a.s) // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1 /block]
// //#/href+/a (// if /keyword // //#name:symbol:word /href name /a.s // //#/href ∈ /a //"type"/literal // then /keyword //"a"/literal // else /keyword //"b"/literal)/block // else /keyword if // //#name:symbol:word /href name /a.s
// //#=:word:word:boolean /href = /a (// //#%:mytype:seq.word /href % /a.// //#resulttype:symbol:mytype /href resulttype /a.s) // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1 // then /keyword //[// // //#/href merge /a.// //#%:mytype:seq.word /href % /a.// //#resulttype:symbol:mytype /href resulttype /a.s /block]
// //#/href+/a //"c"/literal /block // else /keyword //"zzzz d"/literal

Function // newtext:set.myExport:int:word:seq.word /id // #cleanExports /href /a newtext(a:set.myExport, pno:int, modname:word) seq.word
// let /keyword t = // //#findelement2:set.T:T:set.T /href findelement2 /a(a, myExport(modname, // //#Lit:int:symbol /href Lit /a.0, //""/literal, //""/literal, 0))
// for /keyword acc = //""/literal, e ∈ toseq.t
// do /keyword // // if /keyword paragraphno.e // //#=:int:int:boolean /href = /a pno // then /keyword // // if /keyword name.module.sym.e ≠ modname.e
// //#∧:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∧ /a (// //#%:modref:seq.word /href % /a.module.sym.e) // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1
∉ //"builtin internal"/literal // then /keyword // // let /keyword b = //"{From:(module.sym.e)}"/literal,
// if /keyword // //#subseq:seq.T:int:int:seq.T /href subseq /a(org.e, n.org.e // //#/href-/a n.b // //#+:int:int:int /href+/a 1, n.org.e)
= b // then /keyword acc // //#/href+/a org.e

// //#/href-/a 1)/block), /block tt2

// // genPEG /id Module /keyword genPEG

use PEG

, flags2 = // //#empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.word /a
, subs = empty:seq.pegpart
, p ∈ parts.rules // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1 /block // do /keyword // // if /keyword (part.p) // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1 // //#/href ∈ /a flaglist // then /keyword next(flags // //#/href+/a p, flags2 // //#+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a (part.p) // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1, subs)
// else /keyword next(flags, flags2, subs // //#/href+/a p)/block // for /keyword // flags3 = flags
, e ∈ toseq(// //#asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.flaglist // //#\:set.T:set.T:set.T /href \ /a flags2)/block // do /keyword // flags3
// //#/href+/a pegpart(// //#%:word:seq.word /href % /a.e // //#/href+/a //"S2 Else /end"/literal, //"$.0 $.2"/literal)/block // for /keyword lastpart = //""/literal, e ∈ flaglist // do /keyword lastpart // //#/href+/a //"!"/literal // //#/href+/a e
// let /keyword z3 = // // //#adjust:seq.pegrule:seq.pegrule /href adjust /a.[// // //#rule:seq.word:seq.word:seq.pegpart:pegrule /href rule /a(// //"*"/literal
, //"S2"/literal
, [pegpart(//"S1"/literal, //"$.0 $.1"/literal)]
// //#/href+/a subs
// //#/href+/a pegpart(//"//br"/literal, //"$.0"/literal)
// //#/href+/a pegpart(//"$semicolon"/literal, //"$.0:"/literal)
// //#/href+/a pegpart(lastpart // //#/href+/a //"! /end ! /else any"/literal, //"$.0 $.1"/literal)/block)
, // //#rule:seq.word:seq.pegpart:pegrule /href rule /a(//"S1"/literal, flags3)
, // //#rule:seq.word:seq.pegpart:pegrule /href rule /a(//"Else"/literal, [pegpart(//"/else S2"/literal, //"$.1"/literal), pegpart(//""/literal, //""/literal)])/block], /block // //#maketable:seq.pegrule:seq.word:boolean:PEGtable /href maketable /a(// z3
, //"dq:(// //#/href dq /a), /sp /tag <p /tag > /nsp /, //action /action, //br /sp /tag <br /tag > /nsp
"/literal
, false /block)

function // rule:seq.word:seq.word:seq.pegpart:pegrule /id // #genPEG /href /a rule(kind:seq.word, left:seq.word, parts:seq.pegpart) pegrule
pegrule(kind // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1, left // //#sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a 1, parts, 0, // //#/href NT /a)

next(acc // //#/href+/a new, none, none)/block // else /keyword // next(// // if /keyword l2 // //#=:word:word:boolean /href = /a none // then /keyword acc // else /keyword acc // //#/href+/a l2
, l1
